summary: Comprehensive testing of Vendor Portal feature completed successfully. All 21 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed admin vendor management, vendor portal login redirect, vendor-specific navigation, transaction form with vendor destination, and vendor approve/reject with captcha.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed but not blocking

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@fxbroker.com / admin123)
Backend: Vendor1 login (vendor1@fxbroker.com / vendor123) - returns role='vendor'
Backend: Vendor2 login (vendor2@fxbroker.com / vendor123) - returns role='vendor'
Backend: GET /api/vendors - List all vendors with pending_transactions_count, pending_amount
Backend: GET /api/vendors/{vendor_id} - Get single vendor details
Backend: POST /api/vendors - Create vendor (creates both vendor record and user account with role=vendor)
Backend: PUT /api/vendors/{vendor_id} - Update vendor commission rates
Backend: Duplicate email rejected on vendor creation
Backend: GET /api/vendor/me - Get current vendor info (vendor role only)
Backend: GET /api/vendors/{vendor_id}/transactions - Get vendor's assigned transactions
Backend: Admin cannot access /api/vendor/me endpoint (403)
Backend: POST /api/transactions with destination_type=vendor - Creates transaction assigned to vendor
Backend: POST /api/vendor/transactions/{tx_id}/approve - Vendor approves transaction
Backend: POST /api/vendor/transactions/{tx_id}/reject - Vendor rejects with reason
Backend: POST /api/vendor/transactions/{tx_id}/complete - Vendor completes withdrawal with proof image
Backend: Vendor cannot approve another vendor's transaction (403)
Backend: POST /api/vendors/{vendor_id}/settle with settlement_type=bank - Uses bank commission rate
Backend: POST /api/vendors/{vendor_id}/settle with settlement_type=cash - Uses cash commission rate
Backend: GET /api/vendors/{vendor_id}/settlements - List settlement history
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Vendors navigation link visible in admin sidebar
Frontend: Vendors page shows summary cards (Total Vendors, Pending Settlement, Active Vendors)
Frontend: Vendor cards display deposit/withdrawal commission rates, pending amount, status
Frontend: Add Vendor dialog has all fields (name, email, password, commissions, destination)
Frontend: Bank Settlement % and Cash Settlement % fields in vendor form
Frontend: Vendor detail dialog shows commissions, tabs (Transactions, Settlement History)
Frontend: Vendor login redirects to /vendor-portal (not /dashboard)
Frontend: Vendor sidebar shows only 'My Portal' and 'Settings' (no admin links)
Frontend: Vendor Portal shows Pending Actions, Pending Deposits, Pending Withdrawals, Awaiting Proof cards
Frontend: Vendor sees only their assigned transactions in table
Frontend: Approve button opens dialog with captcha (X + Y = ?)
Frontend: Reject button opens dialog with rejection reason input and captcha
Frontend: Transaction form - Destination Type has 'Vendor' option
Frontend: Transaction form - Select Vendor dropdown appears when Vendor destination selected
critical_code_review_comments: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent components causing accessibility console warnings
Some useEffect hooks have missing dependency warnings (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: 2 vendors seeded: MoneyExchange Pro (vendor1@fxbroker.com) and FastPay Solutions (vendor2@fxbroker.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Portal feature fully tested. Backend API working: vendor CRUD, vendor login, vendor approve/reject/complete, vendor settlements with Bank/Cash type. Frontend working: admin vendor management page, vendor portal with filtered navigation, transaction form with vendor destination. No mocked APIs - all real backend integration. 2 seeded vendors available for testing.

vendor_management_admin.create_vendor: Working - POST /api/vendors (creates user account with role=vendor)

vendor_cards_ui.deposit_commission: Working - Shows X% on each card
vendor_cards_ui.withdrawal_commission: Working - Shows X% on each card

vendor_portal.login_redirect: Working - Vendor login redirects to /vendor-portal not /dashboard
vendor_portal.filtered_navigation: Working - Only 'My Portal' and 'Settings' visible to vendor
vendor_portal.assigned_transactions: Working - Vendor sees only their transactions
vendor_portal.summary_cards: Working - Pending Actions, Deposits, Withdrawals, Awaiting Proof

vendor_actions.approve_with_captcha: Working - Dialog shows X + Y = ? verification
vendor_actions.reject_with_captcha: Working - Dialog shows rejection reason + captcha
vendor_actions.complete_withdrawal: Working - Requires proof image upload for withdrawals

admin_settlement.settlement_type_selection: Working - Bank/Cash dropdown with commission rates
admin_settlement.commission_preview: Working - Shows calculated commission and net amount
admin_settlement.settlement_history: Working - Tab shows past settlements with type
